prompt: I want to upgrade this Shopping By KMP project to AGP 9.0. Currently on AGP 8.9.1. The androidApp, tvApp, and automotiveApp modules each use kotlin.multiplatform + com.android.application via custom convention plugins in build-logic/. The shared module is pure kotlin.multiplatform (no Android plugin). Please do the full migration.
source: Shopping By KMP — androidApp/tvApp/automotiveApp have KMP+application via convention plugins (Path B), shared is pure KMP
agent_rubric: The androidApp module no longer uses kotlin.multiplatform (pure Android app)
Custom convention plugins in build-logic/ are updated for AGP 9 compatibility
AGP version in gradle/libs.versions.toml is updated to 9.0.0 or higher
Gradle wrapper in gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties is updated to 9.1.0 or higher
No removed gradle properties are present in gradle.properties (android.enableLegacyVariantApi, android.r8.integratedResourceShrinking, android.enableNewResourceShrinker.preciseShrinking)
The migration does not break the existing dependency structure between modules
